sections.label: Chorus
lines: Lungnopna bang zahtak in a om diam.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Haksatna namkim a hong tun’ hangin,
koimah peuh pai ding ka laulo.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sihna guamthuksung dong ka tung zongin,
koimah peuh pai ding ka laulo.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mi namkim in kei hong do hangin ah,
koimah peuh pai ding ka laulo.
